productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men AC Grp Blue Tshirt
description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, a ribbed neckline and shimmery graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte.
